title: Place Called Glory City
writer: Edward Di Lorenzo, F.X. Toole, Fernando Lamas
actors: Lex Barker, Pierre Brice, Marianne Koch
plot: Former rancher Clint Brenner and the younger Reese, his equal in skill at gun-fighting, are independently recruited to help farmer Seth Grande free the locals of Manitoba town Glory City from vast ranch owner Jack Villaine's rule ...
